title: Livabl Tea Coffee and Sugar Canisters Set - Set of 3 Unique Cork Ball 500ml Glass Jars - Perfect Sugar Tea Coffee Set Organiser
features: VERSATILE ORGANISATION - Our Set of 3 Cork Ball Glass Jars 500 ML Tea Coffee Sugar are an innovative solution in coffee tea and sugar canister sets. Perfect for maximising your kitchen space and organisation

BPA-FREE & SAFE - Made with your safety in mind, these tea and coffee canisters are BPA-free. Safe for storing food and contents, they are ideal for tea, coffee, and sugar alike. Indulge in peace of mind

UNIQUE DESIGN - The glass jars with cork lids boast an innovative and contemporary design, truly unique once added with a cork ball. Ideal for adding a touch of elegance to both modern and traditional kitchens
IDEAL GIFT - These tea sugar coffee sets make thoughtful and practical gifts for tea & coffee lovers. Exude warmth and thoughtfulness with this lovely canister set, it's surely a winner
CONVENIENT LABELING - Each jar in the glass canister set comes with tea coffee sugar stickers. This element makes the ball jar set user-friendly and easy to identify
